# Chembience Core

> Fully reworked version of Chembience: a platform for cheminformatics and chemical data management.

## Project Structure

- `core/django`: Django web application service.
- `core/rdkit`: RDKit informatics service.
- `core/postgres`: PostgreSQL database service with cheminformatics extensions.

## Key Technologies

- Python 3.14
- Django
- RDKit
- Docker & Docker Compose
- PostgreSQL

## Documentation

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Detailed project structure and agent-specific instructions.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Development guide, build commands, and testing procedures.
- [README.md](README.md): General project overview.
